slides.title: The Antigravity Architecture
bulletPoints: Antigravity (Gemini Code Assist) is a fully autonomous coding Agent running in your IDE.
It follows the OODA loop: Observe (read files) → Orient (plan) → Decide (choose tools) → Act (run commands).
It has direct access to: local file system, bash terminal, browser, and the MCP server ecosystem.
Key tools: `view_file`, `run_command`, `grep_search`, `write_to_file`, `browser_subagent`.
slides.codeExample:
// Tools Antigravity uses autonomously:
- view_file('/src/app/page.tsx')       → reads any file
- run_command('pnpm test')             → executes shell commands
- grep_search('useAuthStore')          → search across codebase
- write_to_file('/src/hooks/...')      → creates/modifies files
- browser_subagent('Go to /dashboard')→ controls Chrome
slides.note: Antigravity is not a copilot — it is a Senior Engineer that plans, executes, verifies, and reports back to you.

vi.title: Kiến Trúc Antigravity
bulletPoints: Antigravity (Gemini Code Assist) là Agent lập trình tự trị hoàn toàn chạy trong IDE của bạn.
Tuân theo vòng OODA: Quan Sát (đọc file) → Định Hướng (lập kế hoạch) → Quyết Định (chọn tool) → Hành Động (chạy lệnh).
Có quyền truy cập trực tiếp vào: file system local, terminal bash, trình duyệt và hệ sinh thái MCP server.
Các tool chính: `view_file`, `run_command`, `grep_search`, `write_to_file`, `browser_subagent`.
vi.note: Antigravity không phải copilot — nó là Senior Engineer: lập kế hoạch, thực thi, kiểm tra và báo cáo lại cho bạn.

slides.title: System Skills: Encoding Team Standards
bulletPoints: Skills are markdown files in `.agents/skills/` — they act as 'standing orders' the Agent always follows.
FE Skill example: 'Every React component MUST have a matching `.test.tsx` and use RTL + Vitest.'
BE Skill example: 'Every NestJS endpoint MUST have a DTO, a Swagger decorator, and a service unit test.'
Skills are scoped to the project — different repos can have completely different rules.
slides.codeExample:
# .agents/skills/FE-STANDARDS.md
## Stack: Next.js 14 (App Router) + TailwindCSS + ShadCN

When creating a new React component you MUST:
1. Place it under `src/components/{domain}/`.
2. Use TypeScript with full prop types — no `any`.
3. Create a matching test file at `src/components/{domain}/__tests__/`.
4. Export from the domain's `index.ts` barrel file.
5. Run `pnpm test` and assert all tests pass before reporting done.
slides.note: Without skills, the AI makes assumptions. With skills, the AI executes your team's exact conventions every single time.

vi.title: System Skills: Mã Hóa Chuẩn Của Team
bulletPoints: Skills là file markdown trong `.agents/skills/` — chúng là 'mệnh lệnh thường trực' mà Agent luôn tuân theo.
Ví dụ FE Skill: 'Mỗi React component PHẢI có `.test.tsx` tương ứng và dùng RTL + Vitest.'
Ví dụ BE Skill: 'Mỗi NestJS endpoint PHẢI có DTO, Swagger decorator, và unit test cho service.'
Skills được scoped cho từng project — các repo khác nhau có thể có quy tắc hoàn toàn khác.
vi.note: Không có skills, AI đoán mò. Có skills, AI thực thi đúng Convention của team mỗi lần.

slides.title: FE Workflow: New Feature Component (Next.js)
bulletPoints: Step 1 — Branch: Create `feat/user-profile-card` from `main`.
Step 2 — Scaffold: Generate `UserProfileCard.tsx` + `UserProfileCard.test.tsx` + Storybook story.
Step 3 — Implement: Use ShadCN `Card`, `Avatar`, `Badge` primitives. Fully typed props.
Step 4 — Test: Run `pnpm test --filter UserProfileCard`. Assert coverage ≥ 80%.
Step 5 — PR: Lint (`pnpm lint`), build (`pnpm build`), then open PR with auto-generated description.
slides.codeExample:
# .agents/workflows/fe-new-component.md
---
description: Scaffold a new React UI component end-to-end
---
1. Create branch `feat/{component-name}` from main.
// turbo
2. Run `pnpm lint` to verify no pre-existing errors.
3. Scaffold `src/components/{domain}/{Name}.tsx` with full TypeScript props.
4. Scaffold `src/components/{domain}/__tests__/{Name}.test.tsx` with RTL.
5. Run `pnpm test` and assert all tests pass.
6. Open a draft PR with a summary of changes.
slides.note: The Agent handles scaffolding, testing, and PR description — you only need to review the final code diff.

vi.title: FE Workflow: Tạo Component Tính Năng Mới (Next.js)
bulletPoints: Bước 1 — Branch: Tạo `feat/user-profile-card` từ `main`.
Bước 2 — Scaffold: Tạo `UserProfileCard.tsx` + `UserProfileCard.test.tsx` + Storybook story.
Bước 3 — Implement: Dùng primitive ShadCN `Card`, `Avatar`, `Badge`. Props đầy đủ type.
Bước 4 — Test: Chạy `pnpm test --filter UserProfileCard`. Assert coverage ≥ 80%.
Bước 5 — PR: Lint (`pnpm lint`), build (`pnpm build`), rồi mở PR với mô tả tự sinh.
vi.note: Agent xử lý scaffold, test và mô tả PR — bạn chỉ cần review code diff cuối cùng.

slides.title: FE Workflow: API Integration with React Query
bulletPoints: Step 1: Read the OpenAPI spec or existing `api/` client to understand the endpoint contract.
Step 2: Generate a typed `useGetUserProfile(userId)` React Query hook in `src/hooks/`.
Step 3: Add loading, error, and empty states using ShadCN `Skeleton` and `Alert` components.
Step 4: Run `pnpm test` — mock the API with MSW, assert all UI states render correctly.
Step 5: Verify in browser using `browser_subagent` that the real API call resolves successfully.
slides.note: Antigravity reads the existing `apiClient` setup before writing hooks — it never invents a new HTTP pattern.

vi.title: FE Workflow: Tích Hợp API với React Query
bulletPoints: Bước 1: Đọc OpenAPI spec hoặc `api/` client hiện có để hiểu contract của endpoint.
Bước 2: Sinh hook `useGetUserProfile(userId)` có type đầy đủ trong `src/hooks/`.
Bước 3: Thêm trạng thái loading, error, empty dùng ShadCN `Skeleton` và `Alert`.
Bước 4: Chạy `pnpm test` — mock API với MSW, kiểm tra tất cả trạng thái UI render đúng.
Bước 5: Xác minh trên browser với `browser_subagent` rằng API thực phân giải thành công.
vi.note: Antigravity đọc setup `apiClient` hiện có trước khi viết hook — không bao giờ tự đặt ra pattern HTTP mới.

slides.title: BE Workflow: New NestJS CRUD Module
bulletPoints: Step 1 — Schema: Add Prisma model to `schema.prisma`, run `pnpm prisma migrate dev`.
Step 2 — Module: Scaffold `products.module.ts`, `products.controller.ts`, `products.service.ts`.
Step 3 — DTOs: Create `CreateProductDto` and `UpdateProductDto` with `class-validator` decorators.
Step 4 — Swagger: Add `@ApiTags`, `@ApiOperation`, `@ApiResponse` to every controller method.
Step 5 — Test: Write unit tests for `ProductsService` with mocked `PrismaService`. Assert ≥ 80% coverage.
slides.codeExample:
# .agents/workflows/be-new-module.md
---
description: Scaffold a complete NestJS CRUD module
---
1. Add the Prisma model to `schema.prisma` and confirm with user.
2. Run `pnpm prisma migrate dev --name add_{entity}`.
// turbo
3. Scaffold Module, Controller, Service under `src/{entity}/`.
4. Create DTOs with class-validator in `src/{entity}/dto/`.
5. Add full Swagger decorators to controller.
6. Write unit tests for Service. Run `pnpm test` and assert pass.
7. Run `pnpm build` to confirm no TypeScript errors.
slides.note: The migration step always pauses for user confirmation — preventing accidental schema changes on shared databases.

vi.title: BE Workflow: Tạo NestJS CRUD Module Mới
bulletPoints: Bước 1 — Schema: Thêm model Prisma vào `schema.prisma`, chạy `pnpm prisma migrate dev`.
Bước 2 — Module: Scaffold `products.module.ts`, `products.controller.ts`, `products.service.ts`.
Bước 3 — DTOs: Tạo `CreateProductDto` và `UpdateProductDto` với decorator `class-validator`.
Bước 4 — Swagger: Thêm `@ApiTags`, `@ApiOperation`, `@ApiResponse` cho mọi method của controller.
Bước 5 — Test: Viết unit test cho `ProductsService` với `PrismaService` đã mock. Assert coverage ≥ 80%.
vi.note: Bước migration luôn dừng lại để xác nhận với người dùng — ngăn thay đổi schema vô ý trên database dùng chung.

slides.title: BE Workflow: Database Migration Safety
bulletPoints: Rule: Never run `prisma migrate deploy` without a human checkpoint — always require explicit approval.
Workflow: Generate migration → diff review → test on dev DB → manual approval → deploy to staging.
Use `prisma migrate diff` to compare schemas before and after — Agent shows the full SQL diff.
Rollback plan: commit DB state snapshot before any destructive migration (ALTER/DROP columns).
slides.codeExample:
# .agents/workflows/be-db-migration.md
---
description: Safe database migration: generate, review, and apply
---
1. Update `schema.prisma` with the required schema change.
2. Run `pnpm prisma migrate dev --create-only --name {change_name}`.
// turbo
3. Run `pnpm prisma migrate diff` and display the SQL output for review.
4. STOP and ask user: 'Please review the SQL diff above. Approve to continue?'
5. Run `pnpm prisma migrate deploy` only after explicit user approval.
6. Run `pnpm test` to verify no regression.
slides.note: Destructive migrations (DROP COLUMN, ALTER TYPE) are ALWAYS paused for manual approval — this is non-negotiable.

vi.title: BE Workflow: Bảo Mật Migration Database
bulletPoints: Quy tắc: Không bao giờ chạy `prisma migrate deploy` mà không có checkpoint của người dùng — luôn yêu cầu phê duyệt rõ ràng.
Workflow: Tạo migration → review diff → test trên dev DB → phê duyệt thủ công → deploy lên staging.
Dùng `prisma migrate diff` để so sánh schema trước và sau — Agent hiển thị đầy đủ SQL diff.
Kế hoạch rollback: commit snapshot trạng thái DB trước bất kỳ migration phá hủy nào (ALTER/DROP column).
vi.note: Migration phá hủy (DROP COLUMN, ALTER TYPE) LUÔN dừng lại để phê duyệt thủ công — đây là quy tắc bất biến.

slides.title: Full-Stack Workflow: PR Review Automation
bulletPoints: Trigger: '@agent review this PR' — Antigravity reads every changed file and produces a structured review.
It checks: TypeScript errors, missing tests, Swagger missing on new endpoints, console.log left in code.
It runs: `pnpm lint`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm build` and reports the pass/fail status inline.
It posts: a summary comment template with a checklist the developer must tick before merge.
slides.codeExample:
# .agents/workflows/pr-review.md
---
description: Automated PR review checklist for FE + BE changes
---
// turbo-all
1. Run `git diff main...HEAD --name-only` to list changed files.
2. For each .tsx file: check for missing test coverage + console.log.
3. For each .controller.ts file: check for missing @ApiOperation decorators.
4. Run `pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build`.
5. Report a structured summary:
   - ✅ Tests pass / ❌ Tests fail
   - ✅ Build clean / ❌ Build errors
   - ⚠️  Missing items list
6. Ask: 'Fix the issues above, or approve to merge?'
slides.note: // turbo-all is safe here because these are all read-only checks — nothing is modified or deployed.

vi.title: Full-Stack Workflow: Tự Động Hóa Review PR
bulletPoints: Kích hoạt: '@agent review this PR' — Antigravity đọc toàn bộ file thay đổi và tạo review có cấu trúc.
Kiểm tra: TypeScript errors, thiếu test, thiếu Swagger trên endpoint mới, console.log còn trong code.
Chạy: `pnpm lint`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm build` và báo cáo trạng thái pass/fail.
Đăng: comment tóm tắt với checklist mà developer phải tick trước khi merge.
vi.note: // turbo-all an toàn ở đây vì đây là các kiểm tra chỉ đọc — không có gì bị sửa đổi hay deploy.

slides.title: Team Setup: Skills & Workflow Structure
bulletPoints: Commit `.agents/` into version control — every developer shares the same AI rules.
Recommended structure: `skills/` for global rules, `workflows/` for repeatable procedures.
Have the Tech Lead own the skills files — review skill changes like you review architecture decisions.
Use `// turbo` sparingly: only for `pnpm lint`, `pnpm test`, `git add`, never for `rm`, `migrate deploy`, or `git push`.
slides.codeExample:
.agents/
├── skills/
│   ├── FE-STANDARDS.md      # React + Next.js conventions
│   ├── BE-STANDARDS.md      # NestJS + Prisma conventions
│   └── GIT-STANDARDS.md     # Commit message format, branch naming
└── workflows/
    ├── fe-new-component.md  # Scaffold component + tests
    ├── be-new-module.md     # NestJS CRUD module
    ├── be-db-migration.md   # Safe DB migration
    └── pr-review.md         # Automated PR checks
slides.note: The `.agents/` directory is your team's 'AI Constitution' — it defines how the AI thinks and acts in your project.

vi.title: Thiết Lập Team: Cấu Trúc Skills & Workflows
bulletPoints: Commit `.agents/` vào version control — mọi developer đều dùng chung quy tắc AI.
Cấu trúc khuyến nghị: `skills/` cho quy tắc toàn cục, `workflows/` cho quy trình lặp lại.
Tech Lead quản lý file skills — review thay đổi skills như review quyết định kiến trúc.
Dùng `// turbo` tiết kiệm: chỉ cho `pnpm lint`, `pnpm test`, `git add`, không bao giờ cho `rm`, `migrate deploy`, hay `git push`.
vi.note: Thư mục `.agents/` là 'Hiến Pháp AI' của team — định nghĩa cách AI suy nghĩ và hành động trong project của bạn.

slides.title: skills.sh: The Open Agent Skills Ecosystem
bulletPoints: skills.sh (launched by Vercel, Jan 2026) is the open registry for reusable AI agent skills — like npm, but for AI knowledge.
200+ community skills covering React, Next.js, NestJS, Tailwind, Python/FastAPI, testing, DevOps, and more.
Works with 18+ agents: Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Antigravity, Windsurf, Gemini CLI.
Install in one command: `npx skills add <owner/repo>` — skills auto-activate based on your request context.
Top skills by installs: `vercel-react-best-practices` (160K), `web-design-guidelines` (122K), `next-best-practices` (19K).
slides.codeExample:
# Install individual skills for your fullstack project:
npx skills add vercel-labs/agent-skills --skill vercel-react-best-practices
npx skills add vercel-labs/next-skills --skill next-best-practices
npx skills add wshobson/agents --skill tailwind-design-system
npx skills add Kadajett/agent-nestjs-skills --skill nestjs-best-practices
npx skills add tenlisboa/.claude --skill python-fastapi-ai

# Or install entire collections:
npx skills add vercel-labs/agent-skills   # all Vercel skills
npx skills add Jeffallan/claude-skills    # 66 fullstack skills
slides.note: skills.sh is the community layer on top of your `.agents/` — tap proven best practices instantly instead of writing skills from scratch.

vi.title: skills.sh: Hệ Sinh Thái Mở Cho Agent Skills
bulletPoints: skills.sh (ra mắt bởi Vercel, tháng 1/2026) là registry mở cho agent skills có thể tái sử dụng — giống npm nhưng cho kiến thức AI.
200+ skills cộng đồng bao gồm React, Next.js, NestJS, Tailwind, Python/FastAPI, testing, DevOps và nhiều hơn.
Hoạt động với 18+ agent: Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Antigravity, Windsurf, Gemini CLI.
Cài đặt một lệnh: `npx skills add <owner/repo>` — skills tự kích hoạt dựa theo ngữ cảnh request của bạn.
Skills phổ biến nhất: `vercel-react-best-practices` (160K), `web-design-guidelines` (122K), `next-best-practices` (19K).
vi.note: skills.sh là lớp cộng đồng trên `.agents/` — lấy ngay best practices đã được chứng minh thay vì tự viết skills từ đầu.

slides.title: skills.sh: React & Next.js Skills (Vercel Official)
bulletPoints: `vercel-react-best-practices`: 57 rules across 8 categories — eliminating waterfalls, bundle size, RSC, re-render optimization.
`next-best-practices`: 19.1K installs — RSC boundaries, async patterns, `use client`/`use server`/`use cache` directives, image/font optimization.
`web-design-guidelines`: 100+ rules — accessibility, focus states, form UX, typography, animations, i18n.
`vercel-composition-patterns`: Compound components, avoiding boolean-prop explosion, scalable state patterns.
CRITICAL rules enforced: no request waterfalls, no unnecessary `use client`, parallel data fetching with `Promise.all`.
slides.note: These rules are auto-applied by the AI whenever you write, review, or refactor React/Next.js code — no manual reminders needed.

vi.title: skills.sh: React & Next.js Skills (Vercel Official)
bulletPoints: `vercel-react-best-practices`: 57 rules trong 8 category — loại bỏ waterfalls, bundle size, RSC, tối ưu re-render.
`next-best-practices`: 19.1K installs — RSC boundaries, async patterns, directive `use client`/`use server`/`use cache`, tối ưu image/font.
`web-design-guidelines`: 100+ rules — accessibility, focus states, form UX, typography, animations, i18n.
`vercel-composition-patterns`: Compound components, tránh boolean-prop explosion, state patterns có khả năng mở rộng.
Rules CRITICAL được thực thi: không có request waterfalls, không `use client` không cần thiết, fetch song song với `Promise.all`.
vi.note: Các rule này được AI tự áp dụng khi bạn viết, review hoặc refactor code React/Next.js — không cần nhắc nhở thủ công.

slides.title: skills.sh: Tailwind CSS v4 Design System Skill
bulletPoints: `tailwind-design-system` (wshobson/agents, 10.1K installs): Production-ready design systems with Tailwind CSS v4.
Major shift: replace `tailwind.config.ts` with `@theme` blocks directly in CSS — CSS-first configuration.
Design tokens: hierarchical structure — brand values → semantic purposes → component implementations using OKLCH colors.
CVA (Class Variance Authority) for type-safe variant composition: base styles, variants, sizes, states.
React 19 compat: `forwardRef` eliminated — refs are now regular props. Dark mode via native CSS custom variants.
slides.note: Use semantic tokens (`bg-primary`) over arbitrary values — design system stays maintainable as the codebase scales.

vi.title: skills.sh: Tailwind CSS v4 Design System Skill
bulletPoints: `tailwind-design-system` (wshobson/agents, 10.1K installs): Design system production-ready với Tailwind CSS v4.
Thay đổi lớn: thay `tailwind.config.ts` bằng `@theme` blocks trong CSS — cấu hình CSS-first.
Design tokens: cấu trúc phân cấp — brand values → semantic purposes → component implementations dùng OKLCH colors.
CVA (Class Variance Authority) cho variant composition type-safe: base styles, variants, sizes, states.
React 19 compat: loại bỏ `forwardRef` — refs là regular props. Dark mode qua native CSS custom variants.
vi.note: Dùng semantic tokens (`bg-primary`) thay arbitrary values — design system dễ bảo trì khi codebase phát triển.

slides.title: skills.sh: NestJS Best Practices Skill
bulletPoints: `nestjs-best-practices` (Kadajett, 4.5K installs): 40 rules across 10 categories for scalable NestJS backends.

CRITICAL: Architecture (feature modules, avoid circular deps), Dependency Injection (constructor injection, scoping), Validation (class-validator on every DTO), Database (query optimization, caching), Auth (guards, JWT).
HIGH: Error handling (centralized exception filters), Security (CORS, security headers, dependency audits), Performance (Redis caching, compression).
MEDIUM: API design (consistent response shapes, versioning), Testing (unit + e2e with mocked PrismaService), Microservices (event-driven with EventEmitter2).
Stack: NestJS + Bun runtime + Prisma v7 + EventEmitter2.
slides.note: Rule prefix convention: `arch-`, `di-`, `error-`, `security-`, `perf-`, `test-`, `db-`, `api-` — easy to reference in PR comments.

vi.title: skills.sh: NestJS Best Practices Skill
bulletPoints: `nestjs-best-practices` (Kadajett, 4.5K installs): 40 rules trong 10 category cho NestJS backends có khả năng mở rộng.
CRITICAL: Architecture (feature modules, tránh circular deps), DI (constructor injection, scoping), Validation (class-validator trên mọi DTO), Database, Auth.
HIGH: Error handling (centralized exception filters), Security (CORS, security headers, dependency audits), Performance (Redis caching, compression).
MEDIUM: API design (response shapes nhất quán, versioning), Testing (unit + e2e với mocked PrismaService), Microservices (event-driven).
Stack: NestJS + Bun runtime + Prisma v7 + EventEmitter2.
vi.note: Quy ước prefix rule: `arch-`, `di-`, `error-`, `security-`, `perf-` — dễ tham chiếu trong PR comments.

slides.title: skills.sh: Python FastAPI Skill
bulletPoints: `python-fastapi-ai` (tenlisboa): FastAPI + Alembic + Pydantic v2 + AI Engineering (LangChain, Google ADK).
Routing: APIRouter with prefix/tags, dependency injection via `Depends()`, async handlers by default.
Validation: Pydantic v2 models for request/response — automatic OpenAPI/Swagger docs generation.
Database: Alembic migrations (never modify existing migrations), SQLAlchemy async sessions.
AI integration: LangChain chains + Google ADK patterns for LLM-powered endpoints.
slides.codeExample:
# FastAPI best practice patterns (from skill)
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from typing import Annotated

router = APIRouter(prefix='/products', tags=['products'])

class ProductCreate(BaseModel):
    name: str = Field(..., min_length=1, max_length=255)
    price: float = Field(..., ge=0)

class ProductResponse(BaseModel):
    id: int
    name: str
    price: float
    model_config = {'from_attributes': True}  # Pydantic v2

@router.post('/', response_model=ProductResponse,
             status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_product(
    payload: ProductCreate,
    db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)]
) -> ProductResponse:
    product = await product_service.create(db, payload)
    return product
slides.note: Pydantic v2's `model_config = {'from_attributes': True}` replaces v1's `orm_mode = True` — a common migration gotcha.

vi.title: skills.sh: Python FastAPI Skill
bulletPoints: `python-fastapi-ai` (tenlisboa): FastAPI + Alembic + Pydantic v2 + AI Engineering (LangChain, Google ADK).
Routing: APIRouter với prefix/tags, dependency injection qua `Depends()`, async handlers là mặc định.
Validation: Pydantic v2 models cho request/response — tự động sinh tài liệu OpenAPI/Swagger.
Database: Alembic migrations (không bao giờ sửa migration đã có), SQLAlchemy async sessions.
AI integration: LangChain chains + Google ADK patterns cho các endpoint dùng LLM.
vi.note: `model_config = {'from_attributes': True}` của Pydantic v2 thay thế `orm_mode = True` của v1 — đây là lỗi migration phổ biến.

slides.title: Fullstack Developer: Complete Skill Stack
bulletPoints: Frontend layer: `vercel-react-best-practices` + `next-best-practices` + `tailwind-design-system` + `web-design-guidelines`.
Backend layer: `nestjs-best-practices` (Node) OR `python-fastapi-ai` (Python) — choose per project.
Cross-cutting: `vercel-composition-patterns` (component design) + `vercel-deploy-claimable` (deployment automation).
Testing layer: `javascript-testing-patterns` (Vitest/RTL) + `e2e-testing-patterns` (Playwright/Cypress).
Total: ~6-8 skills covering 200+ rules — the Agent has your full team's expertise loaded at all times.
slides.codeExample:
# One-time setup for a fullstack project — paste in terminal:
npx skills add vercel-labs/agent-skills --skill vercel-react-best-practices
npx skills add vercel-labs/next-skills  --skill next-best-practices
npx skills add wshobson/agents          --skill tailwind-design-system
npx skills add vercel-labs/agent-skills --skill web-design-guidelines

# NestJS backend:
npx skills add Kadajett/agent-nestjs-skills --skill nestjs-best-practices

# OR Python backend:
npx skills add tenlisboa/.claude --skill python-fastapi-ai

# Skills are saved to .agents/skills/ — commit to git
git add .agents/ && git commit -m 'chore: add team AI skill stack'
slides.note: Skills compound — the AI cross-references Next.js patterns when you write NestJS APIs and vice versa, catching integration mismatches early.

vi.title: Fullstack Developer: Bộ Skill Stack Đầy Đủ
bulletPoints: Frontend layer: `vercel-react-best-practices` + `next-best-practices` + `tailwind-design-system` + `web-design-guidelines`.
Backend layer: `nestjs-best-practices` (Node) HOẶC `python-fastapi-ai` (Python) — chọn theo từng project.
Cross-cutting: `vercel-composition-patterns` (thiết kế component) + `vercel-deploy-claimable` (tự động hóa deployment).
Testing layer: `javascript-testing-patterns` (Vitest/RTL) + `e2e-testing-patterns` (Playwright/Cypress).
Tổng cộng: ~6-8 skills bao phủ 200+ rules — Agent luôn có toàn bộ chuyên môn của team được nạp sẵn.
vi.note: Skills có hiệu ứng cộng hưởng — AI tham chiếu chéo Next.js patterns khi bạn viết NestJS APIs, bắt lỗi tích hợp sớm.

slides.title: Fullstack Workflow: Feature End-to-End (NestJS + Next.js)
bulletPoints: Trigger: 'Implement the product listing feature — BE API + FE page with filtering and pagination.'
BE (NestJS): Skill enforces — Prisma model → migration (human checkpoint) → module scaffold → DTO validation → Swagger → unit tests.
FE (Next.js): Skill enforces — RSC page fetches server-side → React Query hook for client filter state → Skeleton loading → RTL tests.
Integration: Antigravity uses `browser_subagent` to verify the real API call from the browser — no manual Postman needed.
PR: Auto-generated diff summary + checklist: ✅ types pass, ✅ tests pass, ✅ Swagger updated, ✅ no console.log.
slides.codeExample:
# .agents/workflows/fullstack-feature.md
---
description: Implement a fullstack feature: NestJS API + Next.js page
---
// Phases run sequentially; steps within a phase run // turbo where safe

## Phase 1: Backend
1. Add Prisma model to schema.prisma. STOP — ask for human approval.
2. Run `pnpm prisma migrate dev --name add_{entity}`.
// turbo
3. Scaffold NestJS module, controller, service, DTOs.
4. Add Swagger decorators. Run `pnpm test` → assert pass.

## Phase 2: Frontend
// turbo
5. Create RSC page at `app/{entity}/page.tsx` — fetch data server-side.
6. Create `use{Entity}List` React Query hook with filter/pagination.
7. Add loading (Skeleton) and error (Alert) states.
8. Write RTL tests. Run `pnpm test` → assert pass.

## Phase 3: Verify
9. Run `browser_subagent('Navigate to /{entity} and verify data loads')`.
10. Run `pnpm lint && pnpm build` → assert clean.
11. Open draft PR with generated description.
slides.note: Phase 1 always has a human checkpoint at the migration step — the rest of the feature can run autonomously.

vi.title: Fullstack Workflow: Tính Năng End-to-End (NestJS + Next.js)
bulletPoints: Trigger: 'Implement tính năng danh sách sản phẩm — BE API + FE page với filtering và pagination.'
BE (NestJS): Skill thực thi — Prisma model → migration (checkpoint) → scaffold module → DTO validation → Swagger → unit tests.
FE (Next.js): Skill thực thi — RSC page fetch server-side → React Query hook cho client filter state → Skeleton loading → RTL tests.
Integration: Antigravity dùng `browser_subagent` xác minh API call thực từ browser — không cần Postman thủ công.
PR: Tóm tắt diff tự sinh + checklist: ✅ types pass, ✅ tests pass, ✅ Swagger cập nhật, ✅ không console.log.
vi.note: Phase 1 luôn có checkpoint của người dùng tại bước migration — phần còn lại của tính năng có thể chạy tự trị.

slides.title: Fullstack Workflow: Feature End-to-End (FastAPI + Next.js)
bulletPoints: Trigger: 'Implement product listing feature — Python FastAPI endpoint + Next.js page.'
BE (FastAPI): Skill enforces — Pydantic v2 model → Alembic migration (human checkpoint) → APIRouter + Depends() → async handler → OpenAPI docs auto-generated.
FE (Next.js): Same as NestJS workflow — RSC page, React Query hook, RTL tests.
Python-specific: `browser_subagent` verifies Swagger UI at `/docs` shows the new endpoint correctly.
Key difference: FastAPI auto-generates OpenAPI docs — no manual Swagger decorators needed (unlike NestJS).
slides.codeExample:
# .agents/workflows/fullstack-feature-python.md
---
description: Implement a fullstack feature: FastAPI + Next.js
---
## Phase 1: Backend (Python/FastAPI)
1. Define Pydantic v2 request/response models in `schemas/{entity}.py`.
2. Create Alembic migration: `alembic revision --autogenerate -m 'add_{entity}'`.
   STOP — display migration SQL. Ask: 'Approve to run migration?'
3. Run `alembic upgrade head` after approval.
// turbo
4. Implement router in `routers/{entity}.py` with full async CRUD.
5. Register router in `main.py`. Run `pytest` → assert pass.

## Phase 2: Frontend (Next.js)
// turbo
6. Create RSC page. Create React Query hook with MSW mock in tests.
7. Run `pnpm test` → assert pass.

## Phase 3: Verify
8. Run `browser_subagent('Go to /docs and verify {entity} endpoints listed')`.
9. Run `pnpm lint && pnpm build` → assert clean.
slides.note: FastAPI + Next.js is ideal for AI/ML features — the Python backend can serve LLM endpoints while Next.js handles the UI.

vi.title: Fullstack Workflow: Tính Năng End-to-End (FastAPI + Next.js)
bulletPoints: Trigger: 'Implement tính năng danh sách sản phẩm — Python FastAPI endpoint + Next.js page.'
BE (FastAPI): Skill thực thi — Pydantic v2 model → Alembic migration (checkpoint) → APIRouter + Depends() → async handler → OpenAPI tự sinh.
FE (Next.js): Giống workflow NestJS — RSC page, React Query hook, RTL tests.
Python-specific: `browser_subagent` xác minh Swagger UI tại `/docs` hiển thị endpoint mới đúng.
Điểm khác biệt: FastAPI tự sinh OpenAPI docs — không cần Swagger decorators thủ công như NestJS.
vi.note: FastAPI + Next.js lý tưởng cho tính năng AI/ML — backend Python phục vụ LLM endpoints trong khi Next.js xử lý UI.

slides.title: Fullstack Workflow: Debug Production Issue
bulletPoints: Trigger: '@agent The /products page shows blank for 3 seconds on first load. Fix it.'
Step 1 — Observe: Antigravity reads `app/products/page.tsx`, the API route, and React Query hook simultaneously.
Step 2 — Diagnose: Checks for RSC waterfall (sequential awaits), missing Suspense boundary, no `staleTime` in React Query, missing skeleton.
Step 3 — Fix: Applies `vercel-react-best-practices` CRITICAL rules — parallel fetching, adds Suspense + Skeleton, sets `staleTime: 5 * 60 * 1000`.
Step 4 — Verify: Runs `pnpm test`, then `browser_subagent` to confirm perceived load time improved.
slides.note: The Agent cites the exact rule ID from the installed skill — your team knows exactly WHY the fix was applied.

vi.title: Fullstack Workflow: Debug Lỗi Production
bulletPoints: Trigger: '@agent Trang /products bị trắng 3 giây khi load lần đầu. Sửa lại.'
Bước 1 — Quan sát: Antigravity đọc `app/products/page.tsx`, API route và React Query hook đồng thời.
Bước 2 — Chẩn đoán: Kiểm tra RSC waterfall (sequential awaits), thiếu Suspense boundary, không có `staleTime` trong React Query, thiếu skeleton.
Bước 3 — Sửa: Áp dụng rules CRITICAL từ `vercel-react-best-practices` — fetch song song, thêm Suspense + Skeleton, set `staleTime: 5 * 60 * 1000`.
Bước 4 — Xác minh: Chạy `pnpm test`, rồi `browser_subagent` xác nhận perceived load time cải thiện.
vi.note: Agent trích dẫn ID rule cụ thể từ skill đã cài — team biết chính xác TẠI SAO fix được áp dụng.

slides.title: Fullstack Workflow: Security Audit
bulletPoints: Trigger: '@agent Run a security audit on the backend API.'
NestJS checks (from `nestjs-best-practices/security-*`): CORS configured, Helmet headers, rate limiting, `class-validator` on all inputs, no raw SQL.
FastAPI checks (from `python-fastapi-ai`): CORS middleware, dependency injection for auth, Pydantic validation on all routes, no `eval()` or shell injection.
Cross-stack checks: JWT secret not hardcoded, `.env` vars not exposed to client, sensitive data not logged.
Output: Structured security report with rule IDs, severity (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM), and auto-fix PRs for each finding.
slides.codeExample:
# .agents/workflows/security-audit.md
---
description: Backend security audit using installed skills
---
// turbo-all (read-only checks)
1. Scan all .controller.ts files for missing @UseGuards() on protected routes.
2. Scan all .ts files for hardcoded secrets (API keys, JWT secrets).
3. Check main.ts: verify helmet(), cors(), rateLimit() are configured.
4. Scan all DTOs: assert every field has class-validator decorators.
5. Check .env.example vs actual .env — flag any missing vars.
6. For Python: scan routers/ for routes missing Depends(get_current_user).

STOP — generate security report:
  CRITICAL: [list]
  HIGH:     [list]
  MEDIUM:   [list]
Ask: 'Auto-fix CRITICAL issues now, or review manually?'
slides.note: Security audits are always read-only (// turbo-all safe) — the fixes require explicit approval before any file is modified.

vi.title: Fullstack Workflow: Kiểm Toán Bảo Mật
bulletPoints: Trigger: '@agent Chạy security audit trên backend API.'
Kiểm tra NestJS (từ `nestjs-best-practices/security-*`): CORS, Helmet headers, rate limiting, `class-validator` trên tất cả inputs, không có raw SQL.
Kiểm tra FastAPI (từ `python-fastapi-ai`): CORS middleware, DI cho auth, Pydantic validation trên mọi route, không có `eval()` hay shell injection.
Kiểm tra cross-stack: JWT secret không hardcode, biến `.env` không lộ ra client, dữ liệu nhạy cảm không được log.
Output: Báo cáo bảo mật có cấu trúc với rule IDs, severity (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM), và PR auto-fix cho từng phát hiện.
vi.note: Security audits luôn chỉ đọc (// turbo-all an toàn) — các fix cần phê duyệt rõ ràng trước khi bất kỳ file nào bị sửa.

slides.title: Putting It All Together: The Skill-Powered Developer Day
bulletPoints: 9:00 AM — Stand-up: '@agent summarize what changed in main since yesterday' → reads git log + diffs, outputs bullet summary.
10:00 AM — Feature work: '@agent implement the checkout flow' → fullstack-feature workflow runs with all skills active.
2:00 PM — Code review: '@agent review PR #47' → pr-review workflow: lint + test + build + security checks in parallel.
4:00 PM — Bug report: '@agent products page is slow' → debug workflow + react-best-practices rules → fix + verify.
5:00 PM — End of day: '@agent write the release notes for today' → reads commits, generates changelog.
slides.codeExample:
# The complete .agents/ structure for a fullstack team
.agents/
├── skills/
│   ├── # Community skills (from skills.sh)
│   ├── vercel-react-best-practices.md
│   ├── next-best-practices.md
│   ├── tailwind-design-system.md
│   ├── nestjs-best-practices.md  # or python-fastapi-ai.md
│   ├── web-design-guidelines.md
│   └── # Team-specific skills
│   ├── GIT-STANDARDS.md          # your commit/branch conventions
│   └── TEAM-ARCHITECTURE.md     # your project-specific rules
└── workflows/
    ├── fullstack-feature.md      # end-to-end feature
    ├── fe-new-component.md       # FE only
    ├── be-new-module.md          # BE only
    ├── be-db-migration.md        # safe migration
    ├── pr-review.md              # automated review
    ├── security-audit.md         # security checks
    └── debug-performance.md      # perf debugging
slides.note: The AI becomes your most reliable team member — it never forgets a convention, never skips a test, never misses a security check.

vi.title: Tổng Hợp: Ngày Làm Việc Của Developer Được Hỗ Trợ Bởi Skills
bulletPoints: 9:00 SA — Stand-up: '@agent tóm tắt những gì đã thay đổi trong main từ hôm qua' → đọc git log + diffs, xuất tóm tắt.
10:00 SA — Feature work: '@agent implement checkout flow' → fullstack-feature workflow chạy với tất cả skills active.
2:00 CH — Code review: '@agent review PR #47' → pr-review workflow: lint + test + build + security checks song song.
4:00 CH — Bug report: '@agent trang products bị chậm' → debug workflow + react-best-practices rules → fix + verify.
5:00 CH — Cuối ngày: '@agent viết release notes cho hôm nay' → đọc commits, tạo changelog.
vi.note: AI trở thành thành viên team đáng tin cậy nhất — không bao giờ quên convention, không bỏ qua test, không bỏ sót kiểm tra bảo mật.
